audience_policies.source_phrase: This coupon code gives a 50% discount for the 202 Boston Harbor Ferry season for the following islands and dates: Georges Island May 15- June 15: Thursdays through Sundays June 16- September 1: every day Spectacle Island July 15 - September 1: every day
